decision.archive_summary: The user wants an in-IDE, continuously updating display of context size, ideally reachable from the status bar and not requiring manual commands or refresh. The current concern is architectural boundary: this must be implemented separately and must not modify or depend on Project Assistant.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic is still the same feature request, so this is a continue. The next turn still depends on the raw context explaining why Project Assistant came up, so keep t10-t11 raw alongside the latest user turn. Earlier verification chatter and superseded 'already connected' status updates are resolved/off-topic for the immediate next step and can leave the raw working set. The durable requirements should survive as pins: visible context size, automatic/live updates, status-bar-oriented UX, and the boundary rule to not touch Project Assistant.
